title: Use of English - Test 3
explanation:
Use of English - C1 Test 3

Final mixed review.

questions.text: [*Were|Was|Am] I in your position, I would seek advice.
The results [*may well|must certainly|will never] indicate a trend.
[*Not having been consulted|Not consulting|Not to consult], staff objected.
You [*had better|would rather|must better] leave now.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The novel's central ____ recurs throughout. | *motif | motive | motion
Gene ____ raises ethical concerns. | *editing | editor | edited
The city changed its ____.  | *skyline | skylight | sky
Critics fear the ruling could ____ journalism. | *chill | heat | warm
[*The extent to which|The extent which|The extent in which] rules are enforced is unclear.
He is [*meant to|meaning to|minded to] chair the meeting.
The author [*attributes the decline to|attributes the decline with|attributes to decline] several factors.
